Done. Here's what was done:

**Root cause:** `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` was absent from `/mnt/data/temporal-workflows/.env` (which commons-server loads via systemd `EnvironmentFile`). The existing fallback to `claude CLI` doesn't work in systemd context (no OAuth).

**Fix:** Rewrote the LLM call in `/mnt/data/clungiverse/packages/server/src/audition.ts` to fall back to xAI Grok (`grok-3-mini`) via the already-present `XAI_API_KEY` when Anthropic key is absent. Removed the broken `child_process`/claude-...(truncated)
